componentReuseV1V2.message: The struct 'DualReusable' can not be decorated with '@ComponentV2' and '@Component', '@Reusable', '@CustomDialog' at the same time.
The '@Reusable' and '@ReusableV2' decoraotrs cannot be applied simultaneously.

v2WithV1Decorators.message: The '@State' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.
The '@Prop' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.

v1WithV2Decorators.message: The '@Local' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Local' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Computed' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.

observedV2InV1.message: The type of the '@State' property can not be a class decorated with '@ObservedV2'.
